## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

## Related issues

Closes #(issue number)
Fixes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / internal improvement
- [ ] CI / build / infrastructure

## Testing checklist

- [ ] I ran `pnpm install` and `pnpm dev` locally.
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm format` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] I tested the relevant UI/UX flows in the web app.
- [ ] I tested the API Worker locally (`curl http://localhost:8791/health`).

## Screenshots

If the PR changes UI or CLI output, add screenshots or screen recordings here.
